name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

Init == /\ participants = 1..N
       /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
       /\ decision = "none"

Prepare == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown"
          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown"

VoteYes == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown"
          /\ \E p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown" /\ votes[p] := "yes"

VoteNo == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown"
          /\ \E p \in participants : votes[p] = "unknown" /\ votes[p] := "no"

Commit == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "yes"
          /\ decision := "commit"

Abort == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "no" \/ votes[p] = "yes"
          /\ decision := "abort"

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means philosopher j holds fork i; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(Seq(1..N))]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> -> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ q[tail] = 1
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ q[head] = 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
         /\ tail \in 1..K
         /\ count \in 0..K
         /\ q \in 1..K -> 0..1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>
